baseline.reason: Baseline claims the root cause is that avio_context_free is only declared with no implementation. This is unsupported speculation — the actual fix is in read_header where wtvfile_close(wtv->pb) is missing on the parse_chunks error path (lines 709-711 vs 710-713). The baseline completely misses the real trigger path and the actual fix.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the root cause: when parse_chunks() returns an error in read_header, the code returns without calling wtvfile_close(wtv->pb), leaking the AVIOContext allocated via wtvfile_open_sector → avio_alloc_context. Accurately traces the trigger path and references the fix in good.c lines 710-713. No unsupported speculation.
